checks.message: The fixture declares a UDG family and a UDG-era pricing year.
The fixture explicitly names UDG as the authority for the comparison being run.
The fixture declares the emergency NWAU pathway that should follow from the class result.
The local official fixture is represented as a placeholder only and must stay inside the licensed environment.
No proprietary mapping tables, raw official payloads, or production extracts are present.

warnings: Local official fixtures are intentionally unresolved in shared repositories.
Transition-year comparisons must always declare the authoritative family.
notes: Synthetic diagnostics confirm the fixture manifest is compatible with the declared pricing year and that the local official placeholder remains local-only.
